data.content: Approved in implementation review. Reviewed worktree /private/tmp/foolery-90c5 read-only; branch work/foolery-90c5 is at 0a24d68c with no diff versus origin/main, consistent with this beat delivering an external Obsidian note rather than repo-tracked code.
